ConstructorArguments: Triggers a haptic vibration event on the controller for this hand.

Documentation.Summary: Triggers a haptic vibration event on the controller for this hand.
Documentation.Remarks: If a haptic event is already running it will be interrupted immediately.

Params.duration: How long the haptic action should last (in seconds - can be 0 to "pulse" it)
Params.frequency: How often the haptic motor should bounce (0 - 320 in hz. The lower end being more useful)
Params.amplitude: How intense the haptic should be (0 - 1)

ConstructorArguments: Stop all vibration events on this controller.

Documentation.Summary: Stop all vibration events on this controller.

ConstructorArguments: Trigger a vibration based on a predefined HapticPattern. All HapticPatterns are normalized (start at 0, peak at 1).

Documentation.Summary:
Trigger a vibration based on a predefined <see cref="T:Sandbox.HapticPattern" />.
All <see cref="T:Sandbox.HapticPattern" />s are normalized (start at 0, peak at 1).

Params.lengthScale: The amount to scale the pattern's length by.
Params.frequencyScale: The amount to scale the pattern's frequency by.
Params.amplitudeScale: The amount to scale the pattern's amplitude by.

ConstructorArguments: Stops all rumble and haptic events on this controller.
